Our Story

Made with Tradition,
Served with Love

Shreeji Mahila Gruh Udhyog was born from a passion for preserving authentic Gujarati flavours. We handcraft every snack and pickle using traditional recipes passed down through generations — with the same care a mother gives her family.

Every product is made fresh in small batches, without artificial preservatives, and delivered safely to your home anywhere in India.

🌿
100% NaturalNo artificial colours, flavours or preservatives
👩‍🍳
Handcrafted in Small BatchesFresh recipes made the traditional way, every time
📦
3 Packing SizesAvailable in 250g, 500g & 1kg to suit every need
🚚
All India DeliveryDelivered safely to your doorstep across India

Place Your Order

How to Order

  • 1
    Browse our products and choose what you'd like with desired pack size (250g / 500g / 1kg).
  • 2
    WhatsApp or call us with your order list and delivery address.
  • 3
    We confirm availability and share the total amount with applicable delivery charges.
  • 4
    Pay via UPI / bank transfer. We dispatch fresh within 1–2 working days.
  • 5
    Enjoy authentic Gujarati flavours at your home — anywhere in India! 🎉
